The Little Pebble Path
👆 Tap any highlighted word to learn it

One morning, Nini and Mimi decided to visit the river. The sun was warm, and the wind felt soft. As they walked through the forest, they found a tiny pebble lying in the middle of the path.

“It’s so shiny!” Mimi said, picking it up. “Maybe it’s magic!”

Just then, a small turtle appeared. He looked worried.

“Excuse me… have you seen a round, shiny pebble?” the turtle asked. “It fell out of my backpack. It helps me find my way home.”

Mimi gently held out the pebble. “Is this yours?”

The turtle’s eyes lit up. “Yes! Thank you so much! I thought I’d lost it forever.”

Nini smiled. “We’re happy to help!”

With the pebble back in its place, the turtle slowly walked down the forest path, humming a cheerful tune.

Mimi whispered, “Helping feels even better than finding!”

Moral: Kindness makes the world brighter.
